A

api() - Element in annotation interface in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.annotation.LogDispatch
Overrides the default affectedAPI (which is the HTTP path).

D

doFilterInternal(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse, FilterChain) - Method in class in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.LogDispatchFilter
 

F

feature() - Element in annotation interface in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.annotation.LogDispatch
Overrides the default affectedFeature (which is the Class name).
function() - Element in annotation interface in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.annotation.LogDispatch
Overrides the default affectedFunction (which is the Method name).

H

handleControllerException(JoinPoint, Throwable) - Method in class in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.LogDispatchAspect
Pointcut advisor that hooks into any method execution within a class annotated with RestController.
healthCheck(HttpServletRequest) - Method in class in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.LogDispatchHealthController
Returns the health status and uptime of the application.

I

in.maheshlangote.logdispatch - package in.maheshlangote.logdispatch
 
in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.annotation - package in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.annotation
 
in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.config - package in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.config
 

L

LogDispatch - Annotation Interface in in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.annotation
Annotation used to customize the metadata dispatched to the APM Server when an exception occurs in a Spring Boot RestController.
logDispatchAspect() - Method in class in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.config.LogDispatchAutoConfiguration
Creates and exposes the LogDispatchAspect bean.
LogDispatchAspect - Class in in.maheshlangote.logdispatch
An aspect that automatically intercepts and dispatches all unhandled exceptions thrown by Spring Boot RestControllers.
LogDispatchAspect(String, String) - Constructor for class in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.LogDispatchAspect
Constructs a new LogDispatchAspect.
LogDispatchAutoConfiguration - Class in in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.config
Auto-configuration class for LogDispatch.
LogDispatchAutoConfiguration() - Constructor for class in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.config.LogDispatchAutoConfiguration
Default constructor for auto-configuration.
LogDispatchFilter - Class in in.maheshlangote.logdispatch
Filter that captures all unhandled HTTP errors (e.g.
LogDispatchFilter(String, String) - Constructor for class in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.LogDispatchFilter
Constructs the LogDispatchFilter.
logDispatchFilterRegistration() - Method in class in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.config.LogDispatchAutoConfiguration
Creates and exposes the LogDispatchFilter bean.
logDispatchHealthController() - Method in class in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.config.LogDispatchAutoConfiguration
Creates and exposes the LogDispatchHealthController bean.
LogDispatchHealthController - Class in in.maheshlangote.logdispatch
A public controller that exposes the health and uptime of the application to the LogDispatch APM Server.
LogDispatchHealthController() - Constructor for class in.maheshlangote.logdispatch.LogDispatchHealthController
Initializes the health controller and records the startup time.
